campaigns.title: Support Omar after losing his job
campaigns.description: "Omar recently lost his job due to company downsizing, and he is struggling to cover basic living expenses. This campaign aims to provide him with financial support during this difficult transition, helping him pay rent, bills, and essentials until he secures new employment.

campaigns.title: Help Save Ahmed’s Life
campaigns.description: Ahmed is suffering from a critical heart condition and urgently needs surgery. Your donation can give him a second chance at life.
